summary: Prettier formatting check failed: one file is not formatted according to the project's Prettier rules, causing the yarn prettier-check step to exit with a non-zero status.
root_cause: Prettier check failed because packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js is not formatted; the prettier-check script (node ./scripts/prettier/index.js) returned a non-zero exit code.

evidence.quote: Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: The log explicitly instructs to run yarn prettier-all to fix formatting issues.
This file is listed as one of the files that need Prettier formatting changes.
Shows the prettier checker script that was executed as part of the job.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Indicates the prettier-check command exited with a non-zero status, causing the job to fail.
Shows the CI step that ran the formatting check which reported the issue.

suggested_fix: Run yarn prettier-all (or locally run node ./scripts/prettier/index.js) to format the file(s), then add the changes to your commit and push.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-11 F2 fix the shim didn't persist model_info into rows.
